mapper.select: SELECT id, `name`, `description`, `parent_id`, `visible`,`status`, `weight`,created_at, updated_at FROM category ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE category SET `name` = #{name}, `description` = #{description}, `parent_id` = #{parentId}, `visible` = #{visible}, `status` = #{status}, `weight` = #{weight}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, `name`, `description`, `parent_id`, `visible`,`status`, `weight`,created_at, updated_at FROM category WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY weight DESC, id ASC
